name: error-handling-audit
description: Audit error handling paths: ensure errors are caught, logged, and surfaced correctly.
steps: List all operations that can fail (I/O, network, parsing, user input)
For each, verify: is the error caught? Is it logged? Is the user notified?
Check that error messages are actionable — not just 'something went wrong'
Verify cleanup happens on error (close connections, release locks, rollback state)
Test error paths explicitly — don't rely on 'it probably works'
Ensure errors don't leak internal details (stack traces, file paths, secrets)
